This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] EncryptionInfo protocol tag 'evil' instead of 'dcapi' is rejected.
  assert_true: Expected a non-abort rejection, got: Error: Error expected true got false
[FAIL] EncryptionInfo with empty protocol tag is rejected.
  assert_true: Expected a non-abort rejection, got: Error: Error expected true got false
[FAIL] EncryptionInfo missing nonce field is rejected.
  assert_true: Expected a non-abort rejection, got: Error: Error expected true got false
Harness: the test ran to completion.
